title: Fresh Sunlit Bathroom Lounge Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Fresh Sunlit Bathroom Lounge Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Peaceful morning self-care portrait built around adult woman enjoying a peaceful window-lit wellness routine with natural features and soft skin texture, cozy white bathrobe, neatly wrapped towel turban, minimal gold jewelry, and clean spa-inspired styling, and fresh sunlit bathroom-lounge corner beside a window with soft white walls, green plant, and warm natural daylight. Subject: adult woman enjoying a peaceful window-lit wellness routine with natural features and soft skin texture appears in a serene wellness moment with smooth gray clay face mask, natural features, soft skin texture, and calm expression. Visible styling: cozy white bathrobe, neatly wrapped towel turban, minimal gold jewelry, and clean spa-inspired styling. Scene: fresh sunlit bathroom-lounge corner beside a window with soft white walls, green plant, and warm natural daylight provides the clean bright wellness environment with soft white surfaces, greenery, and uncluttered morning calm. Composition: Fixed lifestyle medium close-up portrait: upright relaxed posture, crisp subject focus, softly blurred background, ceramic mug visible, hand near temple, calm spa-routine hierarchy. Signature Elements: one hand cradling a white ceramic mug with cute cat illustration while the other rests lightly near the temple anchors the self-care ritual with a white ceramic mug featuring a cute cat illustration, towel turban, bathrobe, and minimal gold jewelry. Style: High-resolution photoreal lifestyle photography with clean tranquil luxury, natural daylight, soft texture, and effortless morning wellness mood. Color Palette: Fixed soft whites, warm neutrals, earthy greens, gray clay mask, white towel, white bathrobe, and gentle warm highlights. Lighting: Natural side daylight streaming through a window with gentle shadows, warm highlights, and believable facial texture. Camera: Medium close-up lifestyle camera angle with crisp subject focus and soft background blur. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Theme: Peaceful morning self-care portrait built around adult woman enjoying a peaceful window-lit wellness routine with natural features and soft skin texture, cozy white bathrobe, neatly wrapped towel turban, minimal gold jewelry, and clean spa-inspired styling, and fresh sunlit bathroom-lounge corner beside a window with soft white walls, green plant, and warm natural daylight. Subject: adult woman enjoying a peaceful window-lit wellness routine with natural features and soft skin texture appears in a serene wellness moment with smooth gray clay face mask, natural features, soft skin texture, and calm expression. Visible styling: cozy white bathrobe, neatly wrapped towel turban, minimal gold jewelry, and clean spa-inspired styling. Scene: fresh sunlit bathroom-lounge corner beside a window with soft white walls, green plant, and warm natural daylight provides the clean bright wellness environment with soft white surfaces, greenery, and uncluttered morning calm. Composition: Fixed lifestyle medium close-up portrait: upright relaxed posture, crisp subject focus, softly blurred background, ceramic mug visible, hand near temple, calm spa-routine hierarchy. Signature Elements: one hand cradling a white ceramic mug with cute cat illustration while the other rests lightly near the temple anchors the self-care ritual with a white ceramic mug featuring a cute cat illustration, towel turban, bathrobe, and minimal gold jewelry. Style: High-resolution photoreal lifestyle photography with clean tranquil luxury, natural daylight, soft texture, and effortless morning wellness mood. Color Palette: Fixed soft whites, warm neutrals, earthy greens, gray clay mask, white towel, white bathrobe, and gentle warm highlights. Lighting: Natural side daylight streaming through a window with gentle shadows, warm highlights, and believable facial texture. Camera: Medium close-up lifestyle camera angle with crisp subject focus and soft background blur. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

promptTranslations.ru:
Используйте английский промпт ниже для генерации изображения; сохраняйте видимый текст, названия брендов, значения переменных и параметры на английском.

promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.
